ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postal code of the user */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* Primary address line */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Secondary address line (if any) */,
  "town_city" TEXT /* City or town of residence */,
  "is_superuser" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has superuser privileges */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a staff member */,
  "is_vendor" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a vendor */,
  "is_customer" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a customer */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login by the user */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the user account */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, vendor, customer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions and capabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the password reset */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Unique token for password reset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reset request was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reset token expires */,
  "reset_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the password reset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attempting to log in */,
  "attempt_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the login attempt */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the login attempt was successful */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the login attempt was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this address belongs to */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* Primary address line */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Secondary address line (if any) */,
  "town_city" TEXT /* City or town of the address */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postal code of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., billing, shipping) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_addresses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this preference belongs to */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key name for the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value associated with the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the API token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this token belongs to */,
  "api_token" TEXT /* Unique API token string */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API token was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API token expires */,
  "scopes" TEXT /* Scopes associated with the API token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was last seen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose data was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "otp_codes" (
  "otp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the OTP */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the OTP */,
  "otp_code" TEXT /* One-time password code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the OTP was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the OTP expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("otp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_otp_codes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
